title: All-True Detective Cases
additional-note: Comics.org reports that issues of this comic consist of rebound or reprinted material from the comics 'Gangsters and Gunmolls', 'Parole Breakers', 'Crime on the Waterfront', 'Murderous Gangsters', 'The Saint', and 'Famous Gangsters'. Except for the first two of these, we have not checked whether those titles, or material published in them, have active copyrights.
